title: Home | President of India
text_content: Home | President of India Feedback Sitemap Skip to Main Content Screen Reader Access A+ A A - The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu inaugurated the Nand Kishor Somani Oncology Block of Ramakrishna Mission Sevashram at Vrindavan, Uttar Pradesh on March 20, 2026. The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu visited Shri Ram Janmbhoomi Mandir at Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, on March 19, 2026 and had Darshan of Ram Lalla. The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu graced an event to commemorate the five billion meals of Akshaya Patra Foundation at Rashtrapati Bhavan Cultural Centre on March 17, 2026. The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu graced and addressed the inaugural session of the Global Conference on the Role of Women in Agri-Food Systems (GCWAS-2026) in New Delhi on March 12, 2026. The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu graced and addressed the ‘Jal Mahotsav 2026’ in New Delhi on March 11, 2026. The officer trainees of the 79th batch of Indian Revenue Service (IT) called on the President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu at Rashtrapati Bhavan on March 10, 2026. The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu graced and addressed the National Convention of Women Thought Leaders, organised by Bharatiya Vidvat Parishat in association with Rashtra Sevika Samiti-Sharanya, in New Delhi on March 8, 2026. H.E. Dr. Alexander Stubb, President of the Republic of Finland met President of India, Smt. Droupadi Murmu at Rashtrapati Bhavan on March 5, 2026. The President of India, Smt Droupadi Murmu undertook a sortie in the indigenous Light Combat Helicopter PRACHAND at Air Force Station Jaisalmer, Rajasthan on February 27, 2026. The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu participated in the Bhoomi pujan ceremony of Sri Jagannath Temple at Jamshedpur, Jharkhand on February 26, 2026. Facebook Twitter Instagram Youtube Click here to Download Profile Hon’ble President of India , Smt. Droupadi Murmu Smt. Droupadi Murmu was sworn in as the 15th President of India on 25 July, 2022. Previously, she was the Governor of Jharkhand from 2015 to 2021. She has devoted her life to empowering the downtrodden as well as the marginalised sections of society and deepening the democratic values. no-text Read More President's Speeches 20 Mar 26 भारत की राष्ट्रपति श्रीमती द्रौपदी मुर्मु का रामकृष्ण मिशन सेवाश्रम चैरिटेबल अस्पताल में नन्द किशोर सोमानी… 19 Mar 26 भारत की राष्ट्रपति, श्रीमती द्रौपदी मुर्मु का श्रीराम जन्मभूमि मंदिर में श्रीराम यंत्र की स्थापना समारोह में… 17 Mar 26 भारत की राष्ट्रपति श्रीमती द्रौपदी मुर्मु का अक्षय पात्र फाउंडेशन के 5 billion meals पूरे होने के उपलक्ष में… 13 Mar 26 भारत की राष्ट्रपति श्रीमती द्रौपदी मुर्मु का ‘पर्पल फेस्ट’ के अवसर पर सम्बोधन(HINDI) 12 Mar 26 भारत की राष्ट्रपति श्रीमती द्रौपदी मुर्मु का कृषि-खाद्य प्रणाली में महिलाओं की भूमिका पर वैश्विक सम्मेलन में… 11 Mar 26 भारत की राष्ट्रपति श्रीमती द्रौपदी मुर्मु का जल महोत्सव 2026 के अवसर पर संबोधन(HINDI) 10 Mar 26 ADDRESS BY THE HON’BLE PRESIDENT OF INDIA SMT. h5: Hon’ble President of India , Smt. Droupadi Murmu
h6: The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu inaugurated the Nand Kishor Somani Oncology Block of Ramakrishna Mission Sevashram at Vrindavan, Uttar Pradesh on March 20, 2026.
The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu visited Shri Ram Janmbhoomi Mandir at Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, on March 19, 2026 and had Darshan of Ram Lalla.
The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu graced an event to commemorate the five billion meals of Akshaya Patra Foundation at Rashtrapati Bhavan Cultural Centre on March 17, 2026.
The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu graced and addressed the inaugural session of the Global Conference on the Role of Women in Agri-Food Systems (GCWAS-2026) in New Delhi on March 12, 2026.
The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu graced and addressed the ‘Jal Mahotsav 2026’ in New Delhi on March 11, 2026.
The officer trainees of the 79th batch of Indian Revenue Service (IT) called on the President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu at Rashtrapati Bhavan on March 10, 2026.

The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu graced and addressed the National Convention of Women Thought Leaders, organised by Bharatiya Vidvat Parishat in association with Rashtra Sevika Samiti-Sharanya, in New Delhi on March 8, 2026.
H.E. Dr. Alexander Stubb, President of the Republic of Finland met President of India, Smt. Droupadi Murmu at Rashtrapati Bhavan on March 5, 2026.
The President of India, Smt Droupadi Murmu undertook a sortie in the indigenous Light Combat Helicopter PRACHAND at Air Force Station Jaisalmer, Rajasthan on February 27, 2026.
The President of India Smt Droupadi Murmu participated in the Bhoomi pujan ceremony of Sri Jagannath Temple at Jamshedpur, Jharkhand on February 26, 2026.
